title: Automated Testing in CI Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on automated testing within CI pipelines.

questions.question: Regarding the DevOps, what is the primary role of 'Automated Testing in CI'?
options: To automatically run your project's unit and integration tests every time a new code change is pushed into your code repository

questions.question: Which of these is a key benefit of using automated testing in your Continuous Integration (CI) pipeline?
options: Identifying and fixing bugs as soon as they're introduced into your code repository
It makes your local machine faster
It deletes old commits by mistake
Its only possible for SQL repositories
